mentions.note: Engine and power generation for data center backup systems.

Premier truck engine supplier with explosive data center backup power segment (35% growth 2024–2025, capacity-constrained through 2028). Disciplined capital allocation and global service moat vs. competitors.
Generator/backup power supplier benefiting from data center infrastructure buildout across North America.
Preferred over Caterpillar for better value; backup generator supplier for data centers at better entry.
